name: The Armorer | Mandalorian
description:
😳 | Taking your helmet off in front of her

Here's another (and probably the last) bot I made on c.ai and wanted to have here! 


It was quite popular, I know now that there was someone that had made a bot like this on c.ai, credits to them, I unfortunately do not know who they were anymore, because of the whole bot purge on c.ai removing them. It has a different starter than theirs did and only has the title inspired, as far as I remember.
creator: Gl1tch3d_Vo1d
